creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Ivan Rozhuk from comment #6)
Well, I'm not going to commit a patch that works around an unknown problem in just one utility that happens to use copy_file_range().

I'm not asking you to debug the whole kernel's fs stack, I just want to see the ktrace output.  I tried to reproduce the problem by copying files to and from an sshfs mount, without any luck so far.
